primary_source: Mayer, M. G. (1949). On Closed Shells in Nuclei. Physical Review, 75(12), 1969-1970. DOI: 10.1103/PhysRev.75.1969.
note: a=8 is coprime to 3 (8 mod 3=2). 3 routes: (6,1),(4,2),(2,3). All Cosmos. The Satellite cycle length is 8, yet a=8 itself yields zero Satellite routes — the period governs dynamics, not route reachability.
